The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application

/Users/ltc/stock-report-v3/stock-report-.serviceRawFile:
service: stock-report-be-v3

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs20.x
  region: ${opt:region, 'ap-east-1'}
  architecture: arm64
  ecr:
    images:
      appimage:
        path: ./
  environment:
    QUEUE_URL: !Ref NewsArticleQueue
    DYNAMODB_TABLE: !Ref NewsArticlesTable
    S3_BUCKET_NAME: !Ref StockReportBucket
    YAHOO_API: ${env:YAHOO_API, 'https://apidojo-yahoo-finance-v1.p.rapidapi.com/market/v2/get-quotes'}
    RAPIDAPI_KEY: ${env:RAPIDAPI_KEY, 'df3d371a40msh23a3226ca5da397p18efd7jsn4ddc8a50cddb'}
    RAPIDAPI_HOST: ${env:RAPIDAPI_HOST, 'apidojo-yahoo-finance-v1.p.rapidapi.com'}
  iam:
    role:
      statements:
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - sqs:SendMessage
            - sqs:ReceiveMessage
            - sqs:DeleteMessage
            - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
          Resource: !GetAtt NewsArticleQueue.Arn
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - dynamodb:PutItem
            - dynamodb:GetItem
            - dynamodb:Scan
            - dynamodb:Query
          Resource: !GetAtt NewsArticlesTable.Arn
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - s3:PutObject
            - s3:GetObject
          Resource: !Join ['', ['arn:aws:s3:::', !Ref StockReportBucket, '/*']]

functions:
  scheduler:
    image:
      name: appimage
      command:
        - dist/handlers/schedulerHandler.handler
    timeout: 300
    memorySize: 2048
    events:
      - schedule: cron(0 0 * * ? *) # Daily at 8:00 AM HKT (00:00 UTC)

  worker:
    image:
      name: appimage
      command:
        - dist/handlers/workerHandler.handler
    timeout: 60
    memorySize: 2048
    reservedConcurrency: 5
    events:
      - sqs:
          arn: !GetAtt NewsArticleQueue.Arn
          batchSize: 1

  report:
    image:
      name: appimage
      command:
        - dist/handlers/reportHandler.handler
    timeout: 120
    memorySize: 1536
    events:
      - schedule: cron(40 0 * * ? *) # Daily at 8:40 AM HKT (00:40 UTC)

resources:
  Resources:
    NewsArticleQueue:
      Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
      Properties:
        QueueName: ${self:service}-news-queue-${sls:stage}
        VisibilityTimeout: 120
        RedrivePolicy:
          deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt NewsArticleDLQ.Arn
          maxReceiveCount: 3

    NewsArticleDLQ:
      Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
      Properties:
        QueueName: ${self:service}-news-dlq-${sls:stage}

    NewsArticlesTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: ${self:service}-articles-${sls:stage}
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: url
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: url
            KeyType: HASH
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST

    StockReportBucket:
      Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
      Properties:
        BucketName: ${self:service}-reports-${sls:stage}-${self:provider.region}

compiledCloudFormationTemplate.Description: The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application
